_readme.description: Reusable sub-workflow. Parent agents call via Execute Workflow node w/ { agent, trigger, status, summary, payload, counts, actions[] }. Writes markdown to JobFilter/Agent Runs/YYYY-MM-DD/<agent>-<HHmm>.md.
configure: n8n Settings → Variables → VAULT_PATH (default works for current machine)
Parent workflows: Execute Workflow node → select '04 Vault Writer'
